news.title:
Redington Ltd to hold an investor/analyst meet on 7th April 2026 in Mumbai.
No unpublished price-sensitive info will be shared; details on Redington's website.

news.title:
Redington shares face scrutiny due to Gulf operations disruptions.
The impact of these disruptions remains uncertain.
news.summary:

news.title:
Redington Gulf FZE faces operational disruptions due to West Asia tensions, with rerouted shipments and delayed payments.
Shares of Redington Ltd fell 0.7% to ₹232.9 on BSE; safety protocols and compliance measures implemented across affected locations.
news.summary:
Redington Gulf FZE faces operational disruptions due to West Asia tensions, with rerouted shipments and delayed payments.
Shares of Redington Ltd fell 0.7% to ₹232.9 on BSE; safety protocols and compliance measures implemented across affected locations.

news.title:
Redington's Gulf FZE faces challenges due to Gulf political tensions; financial impact unclear.
Enhanced safety measures, business continuity plans in place; insurers revoke war risk coverage.
news.summary:
Redington's Gulf FZE faces challenges due to Gulf political tensions; financial impact unclear.
Enhanced safety measures, business continuity plans in place; insurers revoke war risk coverage.

news.title:
Redington's ₹230.2 crore tax demand quashed by CIT(A) for AY 2020-21.
Q3 net profit rose 2.6% YoY to ₹413.4 crore; shares fell 4.7% to ₹247.
news.summary:
Redington's ₹230.2 crore tax demand quashed by CIT(A) for AY 2020-21.
Q3 net profit rose 2.6% YoY to ₹413.4 crore; shares fell 4.7% to ₹247.

news.title:
Income Tax appeal quashes Rs. 230.2 Cr demand for FY 2020-21.
Original demand was Rs. 233.7 Cr; no current monetary impact reported.
news.summary:
Income Tax appeal quashes Rs. 230.2 Cr demand for FY 2020-21.
Original demand was Rs. 233.7 Cr; no current monetary impact reported.

news.title:
Redington wins court ruling against a 2.3B rupees tax claim.
Indian tax authorities' claim of 2.3B rupees rejected by court.
news.summary:
Redington wins court ruling against a 2.3B rupees tax claim.
Indian tax authorities' claim of 2.3B rupees rejected by court.

news.title:
Redington shares rose 11.6% to ₹259.30 after Apple's India iPhone production surged 53% last year.
India now makes 25% of Apple's iPhones, boosting Redington's role as a key distributor in the growing premium segment.
news.summary:
Redington shares rose 11.6% to ₹259.30 after Apple's India iPhone production surged 53% last year.
India now makes 25% of Apple's iPhones, boosting Redington's role as a key distributor in the growing premium segment.

news.title: Jump Trading Financial India bought 4,168,071 shares of Redington Ltd at an avg price of 276.2.
news.summary: Jump Trading Financial India bought 4,168,071 shares of Redington Ltd at an avg price of 276.2.

news.title:
Redington Ltd informed BSE about redemption of commercial paper worth Rs. 200 crore.
The commercial paper with ISIN INE891D14B37 matured and was redeemed on Feb 27, 2026.
news.summary:
Redington Ltd informed BSE about redemption of commercial paper worth Rs. 200 crore.
The commercial paper with ISIN INE891D14B37 matured and was redeemed on Feb 27, 2026.

news.title: Redington shares surged over 14% post Apple's major announcement.
news.summary: Redington shares surged over 14% post Apple's major announcement.

news.title:
Redington Ltd saw a 51.4x volume surge to 30.43 lakh shares, stock gained 12% to Rs.274.
Action Construction Equipment recorded 8x volume rise to 1.02 lakh shares, stock fell 1.3% to Rs.882.
news.summary:
Redington Ltd saw a 51.4x volume surge to 30.43 lakh shares, stock gained 12% to Rs.274.
Action Construction Equipment recorded 8x volume rise to 1.02 lakh shares, stock fell 1.3% to Rs.882.

news.title:
Redington Ltd's subsidiary relocated from Mauritius to Dubai's DIFC, receiving a Certificate of Continuation.
The subsidiary is now governed by Dubai laws, aligning with the group's future business plans.
news.summary:
Redington Ltd's subsidiary relocated from Mauritius to Dubai's DIFC, receiving a Certificate of Continuation.
The subsidiary is now governed by Dubai laws, aligning with the group's future business plans.

news.title:
Redington Ltd received favorable IT Appeals order for FY 2021-22.
INR 136.3 Cr tax demand quashed; no financial impact now.
news.summary:
Redington Ltd received favorable IT Appeals order for FY 2021-22.
INR 136.3 Cr tax demand quashed; no financial impact now.

news.title:
Redington Ltd redeems Commercial Paper worth Rs. 200 crore, issued on Nov 21, 2025.
The redemption occurred on Feb 20, 2026, as per scheduled maturity date.
news.summary:
Redington Ltd redeems Commercial Paper worth Rs. 200 crore, issued on Nov 21, 2025.
The redemption occurred on Feb 20, 2026, as per scheduled maturity date.

news.title:
Redington Ltd's subsidiary, Arena Bilgisayar, restructured its ownership, merging Arena Mobile with Arena Connect.
The restructuring aims at rationalizing entities and improving operational efficiency within the group.
news.summary:
Redington Ltd's subsidiary, Arena Bilgisayar, restructured its ownership, merging Arena Mobile with Arena Connect.
The restructuring aims at rationalizing entities and improving operational efficiency within the group.

news.title:
Redington Ltd reported 16-22% YoY revenue growth globally, excluding/including Arena.
EBITDA grew 2-10%, PAT 9-15% YoY; profit impacted by one-time investment impairment.
news.summary:
Redington Ltd reported 16-22% YoY revenue growth globally, excluding/including Arena.
EBITDA grew 2-10%, PAT 9-15% YoY; profit impacted by one-time investment impairment.

news.title:
Redington's Q3 net profit rose 2.6% to ₹413.4 crore, with revenue up 15.7% to ₹30,921 crore.
EBITDA grew 3.8% to ₹625.8 crore, though margins declined to 2% from 2.3% YoY.
news.summary:
Redington's Q3 net profit rose 2.6% to ₹413.4 crore, with revenue up 15.7% to ₹30,921 crore.
EBITDA grew 3.8% to ₹625.8 crore, though margins declined to 2% from 2.3% YoY.

news.title:
Redington Ltd redeems commercial paper worth Rs. 1,000M issued on 17 Oct 2025.
The redemption occurred on 9 Jan 2026, as per the planned maturity date.
news.summary:
Redington Ltd redeems commercial paper worth Rs. 1,000M issued on 17 Oct 2025.
The redemption occurred on 9 Jan 2026, as per the planned maturity date.
